title: plan-submit (score-submit-plan) output data
description:
Shape of the ``data`` field on a successful ``plan-submit`` envelope.

The slash command applies the cost rubric (see
``docs/primitives/score-submit-plan.md``) to the candidates list
and picks one constraint.

canary_plan.description: When needs_canary=true, a 1-task probe spec (constraint, walltime). Null when scoring is possible.
canary_plan.title: Canary Plan

walltime_arbitraged_from.description: Original walltime ask in seconds before cold-start arbitrage trimmed it. Null when arbitrage didn't fire.
walltime_arbitraged_from.title: Walltime Arbitraged From

walltime_arbitraged_to.description: Cold-start-trimmed walltime in seconds (the value callers should actually use). Null when arbitrage didn't fire.
walltime_arbitraged_to.title: Walltime Arbitraged To

daisy_chain_segments.description: Number of dependency-chained segments the task was split into. Null when no chaining.
daisy_chain_segments.title: Daisy Chain Segments

daisy_chain_segment_walltime_sec.description: Per-segment walltime (post-rebalance) callers should request for each chained segment. Null when no chaining.
daisy_chain_segment_walltime_sec.title: Daisy Chain Segment Walltime Sec

daisy_chain_total_walltime_sec.description: Sum of per-segment walltimes across the chain (==original ask after rebalance). Null when no chaining.
daisy_chain_total_walltime_sec.title: Daisy Chain Total Walltime Sec

daisy_chain_dep_jobids.description: Scheduler job IDs of each prior segment. Always null at plan_submit time; submit_flow populates it.
daisy_chain_dep_jobids.title: Daisy Chain Dep Jobids

runtime_prior_quantiles_sec.description: Per-gpu_type quantiles from runtime-prior; empty when this candidate has no priors.
runtime_prior_quantiles_sec.title: Runtime Prior Quantiles Sec

p_fail_30d.description: Per-gpu_type failure probability over the last 30 days.
p_fail_30d.title: P Fail 30D
